#### What's great [...] GoSearch
Brandon Most

#### What's great

Have been using GoSearch for 6 months. If I am looking for content, the first place I go is GoSearch. Ask a question, get an answer and move on with your day (work). Also love their new workflows feature. I get instant updates on all sales calls that I can use to create content, update positioning and sales enablement for the sale team.

#### What needs improvement

The product is advancing fast so at the moment I can't complain. I look forward to seeing their v2 of their workflows feature.

#### vs Alternatives

Most comprehensive at the best price. Also, they felt like they'd be a partner with us.

Evan Cross

results.title: Google Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Google is more than just a search engine—it’s a full ecosystem that powers productivity, communication, and information access. Whether it’s Gmail for email, Google Drive for storage, or Google Docs for collaboration, everything is designed to work seamlessly across devices. The accuracy and speed of Google Search are unmatched, making it the go-to source for information. Google Maps has transformed how people navigate, while YouTube remains the best platform for video content. Google Assistant is another standout feature that enhances the smart home experience. While Google offers free, high-quality services, data privacy remains a concern. The personalized ads can sometimes feel overwhelming, but Google provides options to manage privacy settings. Overall, it’s hard to imagine a digital [...] Based on 71 reviews

Review Google?

Reviewers see Google as the default tool for finding information and getting work done: search is widely praised as fast, accurate, and easy to use, while Gmail, Drive, Maps, Docs, and cross-device syncing make the broader ecosystem feel seamless and dependable. Several users also like AI features such as snippets, suggestions, and instant answers. The main complaints are consistent too: privacy, targeted ads, weak direct support, and a few product-specific gaps like outdated map data or clunky Drive actions. Founders echo the strength of Google’s search breadth and AI tools.

Summarized with AI

Pros

Cons

Reviews

All Reviews

Most Informative

Subscribe

Pros

powerful search engine(20)

Google Drive integration(10)

fast performance(9)

Gmail(9) [...] Google remains unmatched for the breadth, speed, and accuracy of search results—it's simply the most comprehensive index of the web that exists. The integration across Google Workspace tools creates a seamless workflow that alternatives can't replicate; searching in Gmail, Drive, Calendar, and the web from a single interface saves hours every week. Google's AI-powered features like instant answers, knowledge panels, and contextual search suggestions understand intent in ways that competitors are still catching up to. Privacy-focused alternatives are admirable, but when you need to find obscure technical documentation, research niche topics, or discover local businesses, Google's scale and data advantage deliver results that others miss. The familiarity and muscle memory built over years

results.title: Google Search Live: Interactive, multimodal conversation in AI Mode
results.content:
Kumar Abhishek

Congrats on the global rollout, this is huge for making AI search actually conversational instead of just typed queries. The camera integration sounds really clever for those moments when you need to ask about something right in front of you but can't quite describe it in words.

Germán Merlo
Build Check

Build Check

It's super cool man! [...] Adithya Shreshti
Indie.Deals

Indie.Deals

\\Search Live\\ is now available globally — 200+ countries, all languages, voice and camera included.  
  
Powered by Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, conversations are more natural, multilingual by default, and work the way you think: just speak.  
  
\\How it works:\\  
- Open the Google app on Android or iOS and tap the Live icon under the Search bar  
- Ask questions out loud and get audio responses, with follow-up support and web links  
- Enable your camera to add visual context — Search sees what you see and responds accordingly  
- Already using Google Lens? Tap Live at the bottom to start a real-time conversation about what's in front of you.  
  
Check out the video demo here

swati paliwal [...] swati paliwal

@adithya How well does the camera handle real-world chaos, like identifying ingredients in a busy Indian market while chatting in Hindi?

Gabriel P.
Features.Vote

Features.Vote

the expansion to all languages is the part that actually matters here. search live in english is already impressive, but the real unlock is when someone in portuguese or hindi can point their camera at something and have a live conversation about it

curious how the multimodal memory works across a session though. if i show it something early in the conversation, does it still reference that context when i ask a follow-up a few exchanges later?

Kumar Abhishek
